metadata.seed: Yeah. Okay. I guess you guessed. Yeah. Um. I'm just nervous.

patient.query: Yeah, that’s pretty spot on. It’s just... sometimes I feel like I’m missing out, you know? Everyone else seems to have it all figured out, and I get this tight knot in my stomach when I think about even trying. It’s like I want to connect with someone, but I worry I’ll just make a fool of myself.

automatic_thoughts: Everyone else has it figured out
I'll make a fool of myself

patient.query: Well, I guess I keep thinking about times when I’ve tried to join in and it didn’t go well. Like, I remember making a joke that nobody laughed at, and it just... sticks with me. It’s like those moments replay in my head, reminding me that maybe I don’t fit in or that I’m just not good enough. It makes it hard to put myself out there again.

making a joke that nobody laughed at

Sometimes I’ll get this rush of wanting to be more outgoing, but then I remember how it’s felt before, and I just pull back. It feels like I’m stuck in this loop where I want to break free, but I can’t seem to find the courage.

neutral: Anxiety about saying the wrong thing (finding)

Back then, I just swallowed my feelings and moved on, but now it’s like the weight of it all is just sitting there. I feel more vulnerable, but at the same time, more ashamed too. It’s confusing because I want to change, but these memories just keep pulling me back.

automatic_thoughts: These memories keep pulling me back

Anxiety about saying the wrong thing (finding)
